## Description

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated; `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] Code follows project style (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy` for Rust)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)

## Related issues

Fixes #(issue number) (if applicable).
